description: V1 outcome thresholds for the deterministic outcome evaluator. Contains platform_min_denominator (minimum baseline denominator), platform_min_delta (minimum effective delta), and prediction_threshold (score above which a prediction is considered 'positive'). Launch constants — changes require a new versioned threshold file.

formulas.author_normalized_growth: null unless author_baseline_status == baseline_ready; clamp(weighted_delta / max(author_p75_delta[author][window], platform_min_delta[platform][window]), 0, 3)
formulas.hit_definition: predicted_positive = prediction_score[window] >= prediction_threshold[window]; actual_positive = success_grade in ['meaningful', 'breakout']; hit = predicted_positive == actual_positive
